Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LESLIE CORDERO, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off-calendar. The levy was terminated by the Sheriff's Department because of late opposition filed. Money was released to Defendant. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
